description_long: This is a stylized biplane with a bright red fuselage adorned with white geometric markings, including a target symbol and cross-like shapes on the sides. The aircraft features two sets of white wings, each decorated with red sunburst emblems, and supported by multiple black struts. The nose is equipped with a black propeller, and the tail section is angular with a prominent red and black color scheme. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail skid, all in black. The cockpit is open and situated near the front of the fuselage, with a single seat visible behind the propeller.
description: A red and white stylized biplane with geometric markings, dual wings, and an open cockpit near the nose.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red fuselage, white geometric markings, and the target symbol, with both wings and the propeller visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual white wings with red sunburst emblems, the black propeller, and the open cockpit behind it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same red fuselage and markings, with a clear view of the tail and landing gear.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the angular tail design, red and black color scheme, and the alignment of the dual wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, mid-mounted wings supported by vertical struts; no winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles visible.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers forming a standard tailplane.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a small tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the propeller.
